description: Summary-first staff review projection pinned to one authoritative evidence basis and one summary-parity record.
projectionIntegrityRules: ReviewBundle is a read model and may not be used as a write target.
Every rendered bundle must point to one authoritative EvidenceSnapshot and one EvidenceSummaryParityRecord.
Queue preview and next-task prefetch may consume summary-first ReviewBundle slices, but they may not mint ReviewActionLease or clear changed-since-seen state.
If the bundle, publication tuple, lineage fence, or selected-anchor tuple drifts, the task must degrade in place through stale_recoverable or recovery_required posture.
forbiddenBehaviors: Local browser state redefining canonical request lifecycle truth.
Rendering workflow success from optimistic local acknowledgement alone.
Hydrating heavy media or writable affordances from preview-only or prefetch-only bundle reads.
Using bundle drift as a reason to silently swap to a sibling task or unrelated page.
